items.title: Grammar focus
items.body:
Use the structure from the workbook. Pay attention to word order, negatives, and questions.

Examples:
• I have I understand
• I have a cat I understand Spanish
• You have a dog You understand German
• I have a bicycle I understand only Chinese
• You have a table You understand French

items.prompt: Você tem um cachorro. Você entende Alemão.
items.answer: You have a dog You understand German

items.prompt: Eu tenho uma bicicleta. Eu entendo som ente Chi nês.
items.answer: I have a bicycle I understand only Chinese

items.prompt: Você tem uma mesa. Você entende Francês.
items.answer: You have a table You understand French

items.prompt: Eu tenho tempo. Eu entendo Inglês.
items.answer: I have time I undestand English

items.text: 1. What do you _______________________ to drink for dinner?
I have a cat I understand Spanish
